hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if fp.endswith(('.ts', '.tsx')) and 'node_modules' not in fp and '.d.ts' not in fp:
    r = subprocess.run(['npx', 'next', 'lint', '--file', fp, '--quiet'], capture_output=True, text=True, cwd='/Users/sebastianizurieta/playfunded')
    out = (r.stdout + r.stderr).strip()
    if out:
        print('[lint]', out[:800])
"

python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if 'schema.prisma' in fp:
    print('[hook] schema.prisma changed — regenerating Prisma client...')
    r = subprocess.run(['npx', 'prisma', 'generate'], capture_output=True, text=True, cwd='/Users/sebastianizurieta/playfunded')
    lines = (r.stdout + r.stderr).strip().split('\\n')
    print('\\n'.join(lines[-5:]))
"

cd /Users/sebastianizurieta/playfunded && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -20 | { read -r first; if [ -n "$first" ]; then echo "[git] Uncommitted changes in playfunded:"; echo "$first"; cat; fi; }
